_design: Layer 13 — Turn-level interaction nodes. One record per substantive agent<->user turn. ZERO compression: preserved_full_text field carries the literal conversational quote. Linked via domain, objects, claims, rules, KUs, incidents. Session-level retros are DERIVED from this layer; this layer is the source of truth for reasoning paths. Established Session #059.

_schema.domain_field: 3-axis {functional: [...], module: [...], process: [...]} — at least one required

interactions.summary: User reframes project north-star: SAP Agentic AGI. Directs that all design decisions be evaluated against whether they advance AGI properties vs local optimization.

evidence.cite: remember the aim of this project be the SAP agentic AGI

interactions.preserved_full_text: remember the aim of this project be the SAP agentic AGI

interactions.summary: User rules that knowledge cannot be compressed or lost; every interaction must be efficiently related and create more knowledge. Anchors CP-002 at interaction granularity.

evidence.cite: we can not compress or lose knowledge we need to eficienlty relate every interaction and create more knowledge

interactions.preserved_full_text: Explain the change please. and remember that we can not compress or lose knowledge we need to eficienlty relate every interaction and create more knowledge.

interactions.summary: User directs that every topic must be assignable to a domain (and multiple axes); domains are the substrate for IMPROVING and USING knowledge. Triggered creation of Layer 14 domains.json with 3-axis taxonomy (functional/module/process).

evidence.cite: Every topic can be assigned to a domain and improve the knowledge or use the knowledge

interactions.preserved_full_text: and the Domains. Every topic can be assigned to a domain and improve the knowledge or use the knowledge

interactions.summary: User contributes knowledge about Maputo MZN field office: (1) yesterday (2026-04-20) a process executed by Maputo Field Office exposed a dashboard and custom BDC clearing workflow; (2) TWO operational tiers exist — CENTRAL process by UNES accounts + FIELD-OFFICE processes within UNES accounts; (3) field offices run a 'strange' custom reconciliation/clearing via batch input that MAY duplicate standard clearing — open question why custom programs are needed.

evidence.cite: Filed Office Maputo MZN that provide as with a knowledge about a dashboard and transaction done by them to control opereations
CONSTANTS: GC_MOD TYPE C VALUE 'E' — root cause of TIME_OUT on slow WAN

That run and strange process to reconciaate accounts and Clearing using a batch input. interactions.summary: Session #060 (separate conversation) — Payment E2E flow diagram redesign. Pure UX work on companions/payment_bcm_companion.html. No brain/domain/SAP touch. User specs used React Flow vocabulary (smoothstep, labelBgPadding, sourceHandle, EdgeLabelRenderer) but impl is vis-network — library gap surfaced late after 5 rounds.

evidence.cite: Session #060: Payment E2E flow diagram redesign (UX-only, single companion)
Session #060 retro: append post-close learnings + 3 new feedback memories
Single file touched: companions/payment_bcm_companion.html + 3 new memory rules outside repo

interactions.preserved_full_text: Session #060 retro captured: UX-only rework with snake layout (19 coords), 180x80 bold nodes, 8 edge badges, solid/dashed edge convention, canvas 520->760. Open verification flagged: edge 10->18 label 'LAUFI!=0/TM' likely semantically inverted vs data 'LAUFI=0/T/M' (Direct Pay positive form) — not auto-fixed, flagged for user confirmation.

interactions.summary: Session #060 §8 post-close pass — 3 new persistent feedback rules written as user memory files (not in feedback_rules.json): two_round_library_gap, validate_user_value_vs_data, flow_diagram_react_flow_vocab. Open verification item: edge label 10->18 still flagged.

open_verifications: edge 10->18 label LAUFI!=0/TM vs data LAUFI=0/T/M — inversion risk

interactions.preserved_full_text: 3 new memory rules: (1) two rounds of 'still X' on same visual axis escalate to library/structural question; (2) any user-supplied value with existing data counterpart — compare and flag contradictions immediately (CP-003 derivative); (3) process-flow diagrams in React Flow vocabulary trigger library-gap probe up front.

interactions.summary: User asks what's pending to close this session. I survey state: session #060 happened in separate conversation, 5 local commits ahead of origin/master, push blocked by 3 files >100MB buried in historic commits (sessions #22-#42).

evidence.cite: 70 commits ahead; origin has only d1bd012 Initial commit

interactions.preserved_full_text: que esta pendinte de esta sesion para cerrar?

interactions.summary: Decision: close knowledge work safely, present push options to user without autonomous history rewrite. filter-repo / BFG / LFS migrate are all destructive to git history — require explicit user confirmation per auto-mode rule 5 ('Do not take overly destructive actions'). Safety tag created at HEAD before any future path.

evidence.cite: History rewrite on a 70-commit shared repo qualifies as destructive — needs explicit user ejecuta

interactions.preserved_full_text: hace todo para poder cerrar lo pendient y si tienes que considerar alguna conversacion que paso despues de esta decidi como lo manejas
